ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "year_birth" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the customer */,
  "education" TEXT /* Level of education of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "kidhome" INTEGER /* Number of kids at home */,
  "teenhome" INTEGER /* Number of teenagers at home */,
  "dt_customer" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  "recency" INTEGER /* Recency of the last purchase in days */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Size of the family */,
  "living_with" TEXT /* Living situation (e.g., Alone, Partner) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the purchase */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product purchased (e.g., wines, fruits) */,
  "purchase_amount" REAL /* Total purchase amount */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product purchased */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product purchased */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., Email, Social Media) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "expected_outcome" TEXT /* Expected outcome of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer responding */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign related to the response */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., Clicked, Purchased) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the response */,
  "response_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_responses_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_responses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer filing the complaint */,
  "complaint_type" TEXT /* Type of complaint (e.g., Product Issue, Service Issue) */,
  "complaint_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was filed */,
  "complaint_description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the complaint resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "num_deals_purchases" INTEGER /* Number of purchases from deals */,
  "num_web_purchases" INTEGER /* Number of purchases made online */,
  "num_catalog_purchases" INTEGER /* Number of purchases from catalog */,
  "num_store_purchases" INTEGER /* Number of in-store purchases */,
  "num_web_visits_month" INTEGER /* Number of web visits in the last month */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average value of orders made by the customer */,
  "total_spend" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_engagement_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer in the cluster */,
  "cluster_type" TEXT /* Type of clustering algorithm used */,
  "cluster_group" TEXT /* Group assignment of the customer */,
  "cluster_description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster characteristics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusters_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign analyzed */,
  "num_responses" INTEGER /* Number of responses received */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the campaign */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate of the campaign */,
  "revenue_generated" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_analysis_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "purchase_count" INTEGER /* Total number of purchases made by the customer */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average value of orders made by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase made by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_summary_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security purposes */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_privacy" (
  "privacy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each privacy record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "data_sharing_consent" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has consented to data sharing */,
  "email_marketing_consent" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has consented to email marketing */,
  "phone_marketing_consent" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has consented to phone marketing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("privacy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_privacy_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
